name: SophosUTM Policy Violation
description: Detects multiple policy violations from a single source IP address or user. This could indicate a compromised host, an insider threat, or an adversary attempting to bypass security controls by accessing prohibited content categories.

prompts.prompt: A critical alert has been triggered: a source, **{source_address}**, associated with the user **{user}**, has committed multiple policy violations by attempting to access a combination of extremist, concerning, criminal, or vulnerable content categories. The total number of violations is **{Violation}**. This is a strong indicator of an **insider threat** or a **compromised host**. Immediate investigation is required to determine the legitimacy of this action and to block the source.

parameters.name: source_address
parameters.description: The source IP address of the policy violation.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account that performed the action.

parameters.name: Violation
parameters.description: The total number of policy violations from the source.
